title: pimpinella humbertii
intro: Pimpinella humbertii, also known as Humbert's caraway or Pimpinella humbertii, is a plant species in the carrot family, Apiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pimpinella humbertii include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Pimpinella humbertii include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
